faqs.question: What are your business hours?
faqs.answer: We are available Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM EST.

faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: You can reset your password by clicking the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page.

faqs.question: Do you offer refunds?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all our products.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers.

faqs.question: How long does shipping take?
faqs.answer: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping is available for 2-3 business days.

faqs.question: Can I track my order?
faqs.answer: Yes, you will receive a tracking number via email once your order ships.

faqs.question: Do you provide technical support?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 technical support via email, chat, and phone.

faqs.question: What is your return policy?
faqs.answer: Items can be returned within 14 days of purchase in original condition.
